doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future and proposes a legal interpretation regarding the scope of the GDPR that contradicts current, settled European data protection law.
